cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1915 · 國魂
cover.subtitle:
역사로 민족의 얼을
지켜낸 사람들.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Korean elder scholar (Park Eun-sik / Shin Chae-ho composite) in long dark dopo robe with white beard and round spectacles, seated cross-legged at a low writing desk, brush in hand poised over a stack of bound traditional books, profile view. Background: a window opening to misty distant mountains and a faint silhouette of an ancient stone fortress suggesting Goguryeo. Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson on a small inkstone. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.name: 신채호
items.desc: 아와 비아의 투쟁, 묘청의 난 재평가.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 박은식의 한국통사·국혼, 신채호의 조선상고사·아와 비아의 투쟁·묘청의 난 평가, 정인보의 얼 사상, 안재홍·문일평의 신민족주의 사관 매칭이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small ink brush silhouette suggesting historical writing. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
